name: body-only-no-rating-tcs
notes: Body-only commentary: company update with target reiteration but no explicit rating word. Tests deterministic-only fields and review hook for MISSING_TARGET_FOR_RATED (should NOT fire because no rating was extracted).

envelope.subject: TCS — Quick read: order book commentary
envelope.bodyText: TCS — quick read on the order book. PT ₹4,200 unchanged. Order book at $12.1bn TCV, +18% y/y. Margins held at 24.6%.
